basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 1 Post-Doctoral Fellow with PhD (thesis submitted) qualification. Last date to apply is 15 July 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | job description: Contribute to ongoing research projects by pursuing collaborative research and exploring new directions of mutual interest.
qualification.education_qualification: PhD thesis submitted from a reputed institution in India in Commutative Algebra. Minimum 60% or equivalent from Graduation onward and 55% in Class 10th & 12th.

salary_details.details: Consolidated Monthly Remuneration: ₹ 72,000/- to ₹ 84,000/- per month

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications based on eligibility and research credentials followed by Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for further process.
how_to_apply: Register and fill the online application form carefully.
Upload all required documents including PhD thesis submission proof, academic certificates, CV, and research experience details.
Submit the application before the deadline: 15 July 2026.
Keep a copy of the submitted application for your records.

For Upcoming Opportunities: Candidates are advised to regularly visit the IIT Gandhinagar official website for future Post-Doctoral Fellow, Research Associate, and project staff vacancies across various departments.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary. Candidates must have bright academic credentials and strong research experience in Commutative Algebra. For any queries, contact: Prof. Sudeshna Roy at [email protected] The Institute reserves the right to shortlist candidates as per project requirements.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar has invited applications for the temporary position of Post-Doctoral Fellow in the Department of Mathematics. The position is for one year, extendable up to six months based on performance. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. Download IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 1 Post-Doctoral Fellow with PhD (thesis submitted) qualification. Last date to apply is 15 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: PhD thesis submitted from a reputed institution in India in Commutative Algebra. Minimum 60% or equivalent from Graduation onward and 55% in Class 10th & 12th.
Knowledge of Computer Algebra software (Macaulay, Singular, GAP, SAGE) and good English communication skills.
Contribute to ongoing research projects by pursuing collaborative research and exploring new directions of mutual interest.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Remuneration
content_sections.text: Consolidated Monthly Remuneration: ₹ 72,000/- to ₹ 84,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of applications based on eligibility and research credentials followed by Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for further process.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 (Detailed)
content_sections.text: Visit the official application portal: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ Register and fill the online application form carefully. Upload all required documents including PhD thesis submission proof, academic certificates, CV, and research experience details. Submit the application before the deadline: 15 July 2026. Keep a copy of the submitted application for your records. For Upcoming Opportunities: Candidates are advised to regularly visit the IIT Gandhinagar official website for future Post-Doctoral Fellow, Research Associate, and project staff vacancies across various departments.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary. Candidates must have bright academic credentials and strong research experience in Commutative Algebra. For any queries, contact: Prof. Sudeshna Roy at [email protected] The Institute reserves the right to shortlist candidates as per project requirements.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 (One) vacancy for Post-Doctoral Fellow.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Post Doctoral Fellow at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration of ₹72,000/- to ₹84,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: PhD thesis submitted in Commutative Algebra from a reputed institution in India.

faq.question: Q5. Can candidates who have submitted PhD thesis apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have submitted their PhD thesis are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow vacancy?
faq.answer: Through the online portal: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: One year, extendable by up to six months based on satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q8. What research experience is preferred for this Post Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Strong research experience in Commutative Algebra and knowledge of software like Macaulay, Singular, GAP, SAGE.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any minimum percentage requirement for IIT Gandhinagar PDF recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, minimum 60% or equivalent from Graduation onward and 55% in Class 10th & 12th.

faq.question: Q10. Are there upcoming Post Doctoral Fellow vacancies at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Candidates should regularly check the official IIT Gandhinagar recruitment portal for future PDF and research positions.
